recommendations.title: Queen of Earth
recommendations.overview: Two women retreat to a lake house to get a break from the pressures of the outside world, only to realize how disconnected from each other they have become, allowing their suspicions to bleed into reality.

recommendations.title: Her Smell
recommendations.overview: A self-destructive punk rocker struggles with sobriety while trying to recapture the creative inspiration that led her band to success.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/Halloween
recommendations.overview: A collection of Halloween-themed videotapes unleashes a series of twisted, blood-soaked tales, turning trick-or-treat into a struggle for survival.
recommendations.director: Micheline Pitt-Norman, R.H. Norman, Anna Zlokovic, Casper Kelly, Bryan M. Ferguson, Alex Ross Perry, Paco Plaza

recommendations.title: Lion
recommendations.overview: A five-year-old Indian boy gets lost on the streets of Calcutta, thousands of kilometers from home. He survives many challenges before being adopted by a couple in Australia; 25 years later, he sets out to find his lost family.

recommendations.title: Tiny Furniture
recommendations.overview: After graduating from film school, Aura returns to New York to live with her photographer mother, Siri, and her sister, Nadine, who has just finished high school. Aura is directionless and wonders where to go next in her career and her life. She take

recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, but their connection is put to the test when they become the subject of speculation at school.

recommendations.title: The Swimmer
recommendations.overview: A man spends a summer day swimming home via all the pools in his quiet suburban neighborhood.

recommendations.title: The Con Artists
recommendations.overview: Belle Duke, in order to get revenge on her former lover Philip Bang, organize his jail break. But instead of Philip is the Italian Felice Brianza, AKAS Felix, to escape. Now Felix is obliged to help Philip to escape. He will succeeded and from that m

recommendations.title: Unknown Soldier
recommendations.overview: The film follows Finnish army machine gun company in Continuation War against Soviet Union, 1941–1944. Based on Väinö Linna's best selling novel Tuntematon Sotilas (The Unknown Soldier) and the novel's uncensored version, Sotaromaani (A War Novel).

recommendations.title: La Notte
recommendations.overview: A day in the life of an unfaithful married couple and their steadily deteriorating relationship in Milan.
